title: Incantation — Don't Panic, You Can Be a Really Hoopy Frood

story.text:
# ⬢ Don't Panic, You Can Be a Really Hoopy Frood
**🚫😱 → 🧣👤✓ → 🤝📜 → 📶↗️ → ⚔️║🧙‍♂️ → 🔊💫 → 🚫📹 → 🌐📖∞**

> The echo can't form in a room that's being recorded.
